publishedAbstract: - In a Ceph cluster running with RGW (RADOS Gateway) and HAProxy as Ingress, is it possible to customize the default `haproxy.cfg` options?- Although it is possible to customize these parameters using the `/var/lib/ceph/ /haproxy. /haproxy/haproxy.cfg` file, it is not permanent, because if the daemon is deleted, the configuration is lost. How to make it permanent across daemon redeploy?
publishedTitle: How to customize HAProxy parameters and make it permanent for RGW in Red Hat Ceph 5 onwards?
